units.source_text: 1 於2025年12月31日，總額包括客戶貸款賬面總值27億美元（2024年12月31日：8億美元）（分類為持作出售用途資產）及相關預期信貸損失準備1,600萬美元（2024年12月31日：2,300萬美元），反映第329頁附註23「持作出售用途資產、
units.translation_target_text: 1 At December 31, 2025, total includes total carrying amount of loans to customers of US$2.7 billion (December 31, 2024: US$800 million) (classified as assets held for sale) and related expected credit loss provisions of US$16 million (December 31, 2024: US$23 million), reflecting Note 23 "Assets held for sale," on page 329 (2,)
units.translation_en: 1 At December 31, 2025, total includes total carrying amount of loans to customers of US$2.7 billion (December 31, 2024: US$800 million) (classified as assets held for sale) and related expected credit loss provisions of US$16 million (December 31, 2024: US$23 million), reflecting Note 23 "Assets held for sale," on page 329 (2,)

units.source_text: 持作出售用途業務組合之負債及業務收購」所披露的業務出售事項。

units.source_text: 2 這包括客戶貸款賬面總值72億美元及相關預期信貸損失準備700萬美元，乃與出售法國業務保留住宅和其他零售貸款組合有關，詳情於第329頁附註23披露。
units.translation_target_text: 2 This includes a total carrying amount of loans to customers of US$7.2 billion and related expected credit loss provisions of US$7.0 million, related to the sale of the French business' retained residential and other retail loan portfolio, details of which are disclosed in note 23 on page 329.
units.translation_en: 2 This includes a total carrying amount of loans to customers of US$7.2 billion and related expected credit loss provisions of US$7.0 million, related to the sale of the French business' retained residential and other retail loan portfolio, details of which are disclosed in note 23 on page 329.

layout_variants.display_en: 2 This includes a total carrying amount of loans to customers of US$7.2 billion and related expected credit loss provisions of US$7.0 million, related to the sale of the French business' retained residential and other retail loan portfolio, details of which are disclosed in note 23 on page 329.

units.source_text: 3 於2024年12月31日，總額包括名義金額64億美元及相關預期信貸損失準備100萬美元，乃與2024年出售加拿大銀行業務後撤銷確認貸款承諾及財務擔保有關。
units.translation_target_text: 3 At December 31, 2024, the total includes a notional amount of US$6.4 billion and related expected credit loss provisions of US$1.0 million related to the derecognition of loan commitments and financial guarantees following the sale of the Canadian banking business in 2024.
units.translation_en: 3 At December 31, 2024, the total includes a notional amount of US$6.4 billion and related expected credit loss provisions of US$1.0 million related to the derecognition of loan commitments and financial guarantees following the sale of the Canadian banking business in 2024.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 3 At December 31, 2024, the total includes a notional amount of US$6.4 billion and related expected credit loss provisions of US$1.0 million related to the derecognition of loan commitments and financial guarantees following the sale of the Canadian banking business in 2024.

units.source_text: 4 於2024年12月，總額包括名義金額24億美元，乃與2024年出售阿根廷業務後撤銷確認貸款承諾及財務擔保有關。
units.translation_target_text: 4 In December 2024, the total includes a notional amount of US$2.4 billion related to the derecognition of loan commitments and financial guarantees following the sale of the Argentina business in 2024.
units.translation_en: 4 In December 2024, the total includes a notional amount of US$2.4 billion related to the derecognition of loan commitments and financial guarantees following the sale of the Argentina business in 2024.

layout_variants.display_en: 4 In December 2024, the total includes a notional amount of US$2.4 billion related to the derecognition of loan commitments and financial guarantees following the sale of the Argentina business in 2024.

units.source_text: 以下披露按級別列示集團客戶貸款（包括貸款承諾及財務擔保）的個人貸款賬面總值／名義金額與準備之對賬。
units.translation_target_text: The following disclosures present a reconciliation of the gross carrying amount/notional amount of personal loans and provisions for loans to the Group's customers (including loan commitments and financial guarantees) by class.
units.translation_en: The following disclosures present a reconciliation of the gross carrying amount/notional amount of personal loans and provisions for loans to the Group's customers (including loan commitments and financial guarantees) by class.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The following disclosures present a reconciliation of the gross carrying amount/notional amount of personal loans and provisions for loans to the Group's customers (including loan commitments and financial guarantees) by class.

units.source_text: 此外，繼於2023年採納預期信貸損失披露工作組第三份報告的建議後，我們就第一留置權按揭、信用卡及其他個人貸款（包括貸款承諾及財務擔保）加入按級別列示集團賬面總值／名義金額與準備之三項對賬。
units.translation_target_text: In addition, following the adoption of the recommendations of the third report of the Expected Credit Loss Disclosure Task Force in 2023, we have included three reconciliations showing the group's total book value/notional amount and provisions by level for first lien mortgages, credit cards and other personal loans (including loan commitments and financial guarantees).
units.translation_en: In addition, following the adoption of the recommendations of the third report of the Expected Credit Loss Disclosure Task Force in 2023, we have included three reconciliations showing the group's total book value/notional amount and provisions by level for first lien mortgages, credit cards and other personal loans (including loan commitments and financial guarantees).

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: In addition, following the adoption of the recommendations of the third report of the Expected Credit Loss Disclosure Task Force in 2023, we have included three reconciliations showing the group's total book value/notional amount and provisions by level for first lien mortgages, credit cards and other personal loans (including loan commitments and financial guarantees).

units.source_text: 年內，從第⼆級轉撥⾄第⼀級的淨額為76.02億美元賬⾯總值／名義⾦額，主要受到HSBC UK零售貸款組合模型重新校準所帶動（112.45億美
units.translation_target_text: During the year, net transfers from Tier 2 to Tier 1 were US$7.602 billion in gross book value/notional amount, mainly driven by the recalibration of HSBC UK’s retail loan portfolio model (US$11.245 billion). (112)
units.translation_en: During the year, net transfers from Tier 2 to Tier 1 were US$7.602 billion in gross book value/notional amount, mainly driven by the recalibration of HSBC UK’s retail loan portfolio model (US$11.245 billion). (112)

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: During the year, net transfers from Tier 2 to Tier 1 were US$7.602 billion in gross book value/notional amount, mainly driven by the recalibration of HSBC UK’s retail loan portfolio model (US$11.245 billion). (112)

units.source_text: 元），其中違責或然率與最近觀察的表現⼀致，但香港⽅⾯則錄得從第⼀級轉撥⾄第⼆級淨額11.52億美元，主要因為實施新的按揭模式，加上墨
units.translation_target_text: ($1.152 billion), of which the probability of default is consistent with recent observations, but Hong Kong recorded a net transfer from Tier 1 to Tier 2 of US$1.152 billion, mainly due to the implementation of a new mortgage model and the addition of Mexico
units.translation_en: ($1.152 billion), of which the probability of default is consistent with recent observations, but Hong Kong recorded a net transfer from Tier 1 to Tier 2 of US$1.152 billion, mainly due to the implementation of a new mortgage model and the addition of Mexico

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: ⻄哥無抵押貸款組合錄得從第⼀級轉撥⾄第⼆級淨額10.42億美元，抵銷上述部分數額。
units.translation_target_text: West Columbia's unsecured loan portfolio recorded a net transfer from tier one to tier two of US$1.042 billion, offsetting part of the above amount.
